summary: Plan only. Keep #75299 as the live canonical PR for the remaining command-queue starvation-guard work and keep #79589 open as the linked source issue until the fix lands. #80199 is an overlapping broader alternative with dirty merge state, failed proof, and possible useful pieces, so maintainer judgment is needed before superseding, closing, or splitting it.

actions.reason: #75299 is the narrowest open canonical PR for the remaining starvation-guard scope, but it is not merge-ready under the provided review evidence and merge is blocked by job policy.
#79589 is covered by the same canonical family but should remain open until the starvation-guard PR is accepted and landed.

Maintainer judgment is needed to choose whether #80199 should be superseded by #75299 plus merged #82765, kept for unique docs/runtime pieces, or split into a follow-up after the starvation-policy decision.

needs_human: #80199 needs a maintainer decision: supersede it in favor of #75299 plus merged #82765, keep it for unique pieces, or split any remaining docs/runtime work into a follow-up.
